title: senecio pirottae
intro: Senecio pirottae, also known as the Balkan ragwort, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. It is rich in sesquiterpenes and pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which give it medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, fever, and rheumatism, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. Senecio pirottae can be used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and teas, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
